seed_problem: Select a maximum-weight set of mutually non-conflicting research sites on a general conflict graph; checker validates independence and scores weight/baseline.
mutation: input: relax the conflict structure from a bipartite/interval-style layout to a GENERAL conflict graph (arbitrary random-density edges plus skewed/clustered site values), turning an easy independent-set instance into NP-hard Maximum-Weight Independent Set; scored as total selected value against the single-best-site baseline.
title: Caldera Watch: Maximum-Value Non-Interfering Monitoring Sites
strategies: single-best-site baseline: build only the highest-value station (calibration point, ratio 0.1)
weight-greedy: sort sites by value descending, add each site if it conflicts with nothing already chosen
degree-aware greedy: order by value/(1+conflict-degree) so cheap-to-fit high-value sites go first
local search: degree-aware greedy start, then repeatedly add any free site and do remove-one/add-many swaps, with several seeded randomized restarts keeping the best independent set
